description: A quantitative and qualitative study of manufacturing processes including machining, extrusion, sheet metal forming, welding, and casting for metals; and additive manufacturing, extrusion, injection molding, thermoforming and blow molding for plastics. Emphasis on process selection for optimum design. Laboratory experiments and demonstrations. Quality, strength, and economic evaluations.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (M S & E 350,351, or352) or (declared in Biological Systems Engineering: Machinery Systems, BS andM E 306orE M A 303)
